plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate high risk.
Reduce exposure in SPY and CRWD to lower concentration.
Trim QQQI to free up capital for quality additions.
Add CEG and CRM as they are strong, quality setups.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with reduced risk.
Targeting a steady, low-drawdown return.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of roughly 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, holding a larger cash buffer. Expect lower potential gains but also much smaller potential losses.

plan: Trim SOXL and sell SPAL to reduce leverage.
Reduce SPY allocation to meet concentration limits.
Trim QQQI to make room for growth-oriented additions.
Add CRWD to increase quality tech exposure.
Add META and CEG as they are strong, well-rated setups.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction.
balanced.read: This balanced approach targets around 2.5% per month by blending broad market exposure with quality tech and limited leverage. It trims high-risk positions and reduces concentration while adding strong, well-rated names. Expect moderate growth with controlled drawdowns.

plan: Increase exposure to SOXL and SPAL for leveraged growth.
Trim SPY to reduce broad index concentration.
Sell QQQI to free up capital for aggressive plays.
Trim SMH to exit a weaker semiconductor position.
Add CRWD and NVDU to concentrate on high-conviction names.
This plan maximizes growth potential with higher risk.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets approximately 4% per month by concentrating on high-scoring tech and leveraging ETFs. It accepts higher risk, including amplified drawdowns due to leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is crucial to manage potential large losses.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to remove volatility.
Increase QQQI allocation for steady income generation.
Trim SPY and CRWD to reduce growth-oriented exposure.
Sell SMH to exit the volatile semiconductor sector.
Add CEG as a more stable, income-producing asset.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and income.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets about 1% per month by shifting to income-generating assets like QQQI and stable names like CEG. It minimizes leverage and high-beta tech exposure to reduce risk and preserve capital. Expect reliable, though variable, monthly distributions with lower overall growth potential.
